## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX teams to discuss content performance, updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Minor fluctuations in blog/page views; competitor TravelPark gained traction with UX upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Good bump in sessions, new email marketing pages getting initial clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Publishing workflow: GrowthX improving efficiency (22→35-40 pages/week), automation pending](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [AI release for Ramp agents upcoming; Luke to send content targets for GrowthX support](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Blog pages: Some decline in sessions/views (e.g., mileage reimbursement, IRS, receipt requirements)](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
  - [Quartium pages: Stable performance; TravelPark overtaking in exact match searches post-UX upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Tuning pages: Slight bump in views; e-commerce accounting page views skyrocketed on 27th](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Treasury pages: Stable; minor dips for available funds report and cash yield analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Vendor pages: Good bump; new email marketing pages getting initial clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Updates

  - [Vendor pages: Awaiting Marketo-Snowflake integration for pie chart; MS Planner publishing on hold](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Email marketing "versus" pages: 5 pages left, completion expected tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Publishing automation: GrowthX exploring options with provided API key](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Ramp-Stripe Stablecoin partnership: Content not needed until 2026 launch](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [AI release for Ramp agents: Luke to send content targets for GrowthX support](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Rewrite Feedback

  - [Matt reviewing first rewrite from latest batch](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Initial impression: Tone slightly too casual, especially in headlines](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Concerns about "wall of text" sections; formatting adjustments needed](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)

### GrowthX Internal Processes

  - [Internal audit and migrations planned for next week](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Vendor Page Workflow Improvements

  - [Not yet automated, but process consolidated](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Capacity increased from 22 to 35-40 pages/week](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Publishing automation is the final step to reach desired scale](https://fathom.video/share/Lfvz_6WDr1eysv2N3RyxyKZJYKi5sTH2?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
